hero.headline: Your finances,
hero.subtitle: Breezkit analyzes your income, expenses, and goals with artificial intelligence to give you an actionable savings and investment plan — tailored to your risk profile.

features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't.
features.subtitle: A powerful toolkit designed to feel simple.

aiAnalysis.title: AI Analysis
aiAnalysis.desc: Algorithms that evaluate your habits and generate accurate recommendations in real time.

smartSaving.title: Smart Saving
smartSaving.desc: Detect money leaks and automatically build your emergency fund.

investments.title: Tailored Investments
investments.desc: Suggestions adapted to your risk profile, horizon, and available capital.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.desc: Your data is encrypted end-to-end. You decide what to share and when.

alerts.title: Live Alerts
alerts.desc: Notifications when a budget approaches its limit or when we detect something unusual.

dashboard.title: Full Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Visualize your finances with clear charts and actionable metrics instantly.

goals.title: Custom Goals
goals.desc: Set savings goals with deadlines and receive automatic progress tracking.

support.title: Continuous Support
support.desc: We evolve with you. New features and improvements every month.

sync.title: Full Sync
sync.desc: Your data instantly across all devices. Never lose track.

pricing.title: Everything free. Forever.
pricing.subtitle: No plans, no artificial limits, no fine print.
pricing.fullAccess: Full access to all features, no restrictions.

items.q: Do I need financial knowledge to use Breezkit?
items.a: No. The AI translates your data into concrete, understandable steps. If you can read a text message, you can use Breezkit.
Yes. We encrypt information in transit and at rest. We never sell data and you control what is shared.
Yes, no commitment or hidden costs. The Free plan is forever.
Yes. The Enterprise plan includes multi-user, consolidated reports, and dedicated support.

items.q: What devices does it work on?
items.a: It's a responsive web app: works on mobile, tablet, and desktop without installing anything.

cta.title: Take control of your money today.
cta.subtitle: Join the first wave of Breezkit users and start receiving personalized AI recommendations.

footer.description: Digital financial advisor powered by artificial intelligence.
footer.tagline: Made with care for your finances.

howItWorks.title: Your money, step by step.
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to take control of your finances.
howItWorks.s1d: Link your bank accounts, digital wallets, and cards in seconds. End-to-end encrypted.
howItWorks.s2d: Our AI studies your income, expenses, and goals to build a complete financial profile.
howItWorks.s3d: Get personalized recommendations for saving, investing, and spending with concrete steps.

security.title: Your data, your control.
security.subtitle: Privacy is not an option — it's the foundation of the product.
security.s1d: All your data is encrypted in transit and at rest using military-grade standards.
security.s2d: You can audit every line of code. Total transparency and an active community.
security.s3d: We don't sell data. We don't show ads. Your attention is not the product.
security.s4d: Export or delete your data anytime. No hurdles, no delays.

useCases.title: For you, for your team, for your business.
useCases.subtitle: Breezkit adapts to your financial reality.
useCases.s1d: Take control of your personal finances, save for your goals, and optimize daily spending.
useCases.s2d: Shared finances without conflict. Common goals, synced budgets, no surprises.
useCases.s3d: Separate income from expenses, estimate taxes, and project slow months with ease.
useCases.s4d: Multiple users, consolidated reports, and real-time cash flow for your business.

comparison.title: Why Breezkit?
comparison.subtitle: We're not Excel on steroids. Nor a traditional digital bank.

integrations.title: Connect your ecosystem.
integrations.subtitle: Coming soon: link your favorite financial tools effortlessly.

dashboardPreview.title: Sneak peek.
dashboardPreview.subtitle: This is what control looks like.
